/Users/gordie/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++ -Werror -Wall -DGL_SILENCE_DEPRECATION --shell-file=/Users/gordie/Developer/WebEngine/assets/game_shell.html -O3 -sUSE_WEBGL2=1 -std=c++23 --emrun -sUSE_GLFW=3 --browser=chrome -Wno-error=limited-postlink-optimizations -sMAXIMUM_MEMORY=512MB -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH -DGLFW_BUILD_WAYLAN -sGL_ASSERTIONS=1 -sGL_DEBUG=1 -sASSERTIONS=1 @CMakeFiles/ECSEngine.dir/objects1.rsp -o ECSEngine.html @CMakeFiles/ECSEngine.dir/linkLibs.rsp
